Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ARI MOSS, TEL. NO. (310) 782-2984 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEVEN L. FRIEDLANDER OF SV EMPLOYMENT LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (650) 265-0222 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - The court inquired in open court whether anyone is objecting to the approval of the class action and with no one objecting, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Granted. No opposition filed and there is good cause for all the relief sought by the motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913

Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KENNETH GOLDMAN, Tel No. (818) 287-7689 appearing for Plaintiff Ezequiel Jimenez;
Atty. STEVEN L. FRIEDLANDER of SV Employment Law Firm, PC, Tel No. (650) 265-0222 appearing for Defendant Max's World.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Joint Motion for Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED.
